info.title: Barnaverndargátt API
info.description:
Gátt fyrir aðila til að skila inn tilkynningum vegna barnaverndarmála.
Build time(version): 2026-07-22 10:32:42

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of protection services.
get.description: Gets a paginated list dto for protection services and their informations. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Gets all application clients.
get.description: Retrieves a list of all application clients. **Required Roles:** Authority.

get.summary: Gets the application client for your institution.
get.description: Retrieves the details of the application client for your institution. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

get.summary: Gets all non-ProtectionService institutions.
get.description: Retrieves a list of all institutions that are not of type ProtectionService, for client credential management. **Required Roles:** Authority.

get.summary: Gets a an application client by ID.
get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific application client using their Client Id. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

post.summary: Registers an application client for client credentials grant.
post.description: Registers an application client OAuth 2.0 Client with Credentials Grant. Connect the client to a specific institution. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

patch.summary: Renews the client secret for an application client.
patch.description: Renews the client secret for an application client. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

post.description: Create a single case. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets a list of info responses about cases for a protection service.
get.description: Gets a list of info responses about cases for a protection service based date from and to. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

post.summary: Add files to a specific case.
post.description: Add files to a specific case. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get a single case.
get.description: Gets a single case **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets a list of infos about cases for a protection service.
get.description: Gets a list of infos about cases for a protection service based on a filter. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets a list of infos about cases for a protection service that it has sent.
get.description: Gets a list of infos about cases for a protection service that is has sent based on a filter. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get all Categories and their SubCategories.
get.description: Gets list of categoryList for all Categories and their SubCategories. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get all Categories and their SubCategories as enums.
get.description: Gets list of categoryList for all Categories and their SubCategories as enums. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Police, ChildCare.

get.summary: Get protective factor categories.
get.description: Returns the 2 protective factor sections with their sub-categories and selectable items. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get a list of notifications for a child.
get.description: Gets a list of notifications for a child from childId. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get paginated list of ChildResponse.
get.description: Gets a paginated list of ChildInfo. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get a single child.
get.description: Gets a single child based on the nationalId or the childs key. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

post.summary: Upload a document template for a type.
post.description: Upload a document template for a type, update if already in db. **Required Roles:** Authority.

get.summary: Get a document template.
get.description: Get a document template for a type. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all NotifierRoles for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of NotifierRoles with Code as value and Name as label. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all Obligations for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of Obligations with Code as value and Name as label. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches the main four Categories for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of Categories with Code as value and Name as label. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all NotificationStates for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of NotificationStates with Code as value and Name as label. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all Protection services for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of ProtectionServices with Guid and Name. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all communes for a logged in protection service to use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of Communes with Guid and Name. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all postalCodes for a logged in protection service to use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of postal codes with Guid and Name. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all Institutions for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of Institutions with Guid and Name. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all Pronouns for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of Pronouns with Code as value and Name as label. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all Protection services for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a list of ProtectionServices with Code and Name. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Fetches all languages for use as a dropdown list
get.description: Returns a hardcoded list of languages where label and value are both the language display string. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get all notifier roles
get.description: Returns notifier roles with integer code as value and Icelandic name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all obligation types
get.description: Returns obligation types (reporter category) with integer code as value and Icelandic name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all notification categories with subcategories
get.description: Returns the full hierarchical category tree. Each entry has a 'code' (submit to API) and a 'label' (display in UI). **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get protective factor categories
get.description: Returns the two protective factor sections with their subcategories and selectable items. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all urgency assessment options
get.description: Returns urgency assessment levels with integer code as value, Icelandic name as label, and a longer sentence-form description. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all gender options
get.description: Returns gender values with integer code as value and Icelandic name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all party state options
get.description: Returns party state values (e.g. IcelandicNationalId, Tourist, Unknown) with integer code as value and Icelandic name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all personal pronoun options
get.description: Returns personal pronoun (persónufornafn) values with integer code as value and Icelandic name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all postal codes
get.description: Returns all Icelandic postal codes with Guid as value and name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get all protection services
get.description: Returns all child protection services with their 3-digit code as value and name as label. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

post.description: Creates a child protection notification on behalf of a member of the general public (16. gr.). Nemendagrunnur data is fetched automatically using the child's national ID. **Required Roles:** type:digital_iceland.

get.summary: Get a single NationalRegistry.
get.description: Gets a single NationalRegistry based on the nationalId.

get.summary: Get student school and language data from Nemendagrunnur
get.description: Fetches school name, language background, and wellbeing data from Gagnamidlunargatt by child national ID. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Get all notifications based on their states.
get.description: Retrieves a list of notifications filtered by the specified notification states. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get paged notification information.
get.description: Retrieves a paged list of notification information based on specified filters. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets a list of notification that a institution has reported.
get.description: A list of notification that a institution has reported but does not have responsibility over. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get a single notification.
get.description: Gets a single notification with a notification id. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

put.description: Updates a single notification with a notificationUpdateRequest and increases the version number. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets a list of notifications for protection service.
get.description: Get all notifications for a specific protection service within a specific time period. DateFrom is required but dateTo is optional. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

post.summary: Creates a single notification for GeneralPublic.
post.description: Create a single notification with a notificationRequest for General public regarding 16. gr. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.
Creates a single notification with a notificationRequest for those involved with children regarding 17.gr. **Required Roles:** ChildCare, ProtectionService.
Creates a single notification with a notificationRequest for Police regarding 18. gr. **Required Roles:** Police, ProtectionService.
Creates a single notification with a notificationRequest for child protective services regarding 21.gr. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

put.summary: Confirm a list of notifications as received.
put.description: Confirmes a list of notifications to be recieved by a protection service. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

patch.summary: Update the status of a notification.
patch.description: Updates only the status field of a notification. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

put.description: Transfers notification from the assigned postal code to the inputted one without asking any questions about why. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get a single pdf for a notification.
get.description: Gets a single pfd for notifiction with a notification id. The notification will be mark as recieved at the same time. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

put.description: Update a protectionService. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

get.summary: Get a single protection service.
get.description: Gets a single protection service with a protection service id. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Get info about a single protection service.
get.description: Gets info about a single protection service with a protection service id. **Required Roles:** ProtectionService.

get.summary: Gets current statistic count for notifications.
get.description: Gets variables as a list that return a count for notifications for the overview page. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Get a paginated statisticsResponse for notifications.
get.description: Gets a paginated list of statisticResponse for monthly statistics for a given month and year. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

post.summary: Get a monthly report for notifications in excel format.
post.description: Gets a excel document for monthly statistics for notifications. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

post.summary: Get a monthly report for notifications.
post.description: Gets a response model for monthly statistics for notifications. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

post.summary: A function to confirm notifications for a given period.
post.description: A function to confirm all notification for a given month and year is ready for statistics processing. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Function that returns a list of protection services and their status of confirmed notifications.
get.description: Function that returns counters and list of protection services with information about if they have confirmed  notifications for the given month and year. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Gets information for continuous registration report.
get.description: Gets information for continuous registration report for a given month and year, optional communeids and postalcodesId. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

post.summary: Gets information for continuous registration report in a file format.
post.description: Gets information for continuous registration report in a file for a given month and year, optional communeids and postalcodesId. **Required Roles:** Authority, ProtectionService, Admin, SuperAdmin.

get.summary: Gets all tenants.
get.description: Retrieves a list of all tenants. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

post.summary: Registers a Microsoft tenant as a viable authentication source.
post.description: Registers a Microsoft tenant as a viable authentication source. Connect the source to a specific protection service if applicable. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

get.summary: Gets a tenant by ID.
get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific tenant using their unique identifier. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

get.summary: Gets a list of all users.
get.description: Gets a list of all users in the system. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

post.description: Creates a new user with the provided details. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

get.summary: Gets a user by ID.
get.description: Gets the details of a user by their ID. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

patch.description: Patches an existing user with the provided details. **Required Roles:** Admin, Authority.

email.description: Netfang sem er tengt við Microsoft aðgang hjá stofnuninni.
